title: BatchNorm vs LayerNorm vs RMSNorm
tagline: Three normalizations, one tensor — see exactly what each averages over.
summary: Pick a 4D tensor (batch, channels, height, width) or a sequence (batch, length, dim). Toggle BN / LN / RMSNorm. Highlights show exactly which slice each method averages over. Critical for understanding why BN dominated CNNs but LayerNorm dominates Transformers — and why RMSNorm is the modern simplification.
highlights: Hover the tensor to see which slice each normalization averages over.
Compare BN's train/eval discrepancy (running stats) with LN's symmetry across batch.
Toggle RMSNorm to see what dropping the mean centering changes.
